sensory_synthesis.interpretation: The system appears to be functioning normally with the exception of inconsistent current readings. The battery level is high, indicating sufficient power. The depth and drift are within safe and acceptable limits. The navigation error is low, and the position is accurate. The time is within expected range, and the velocity is within normal range. The waypoint is at the start, suggesting the mission has not yet begun.
